title: lichen_l2.c:720 peer eviction does not secure_zero old pubkey
description: Gap found: Round 1 missed SECURITY defense-in-depth issue. On LRU peer eviction (lines 715-720), the old peer's pubkey is overwritten via memcpy without first being secure_zero'd. While the window is extremely narrow (a few instructions), defense-in-depth suggests zeroing key material before overwriting. Compare with peer_remove at line 796 which correctly calls secure_zero. HOW TO FIX: Add secure_zero(peer_table[slot].pubkey, sizeof(peer_table[slot].pubkey)) before line 720 and same for eui64.
